title: Goldfish Growth
description: What is the typical growth pattern and adult size of goldfish?
narrative: The user wants to know whether goldfish grow, how quickly they increase in size, and what their typical adult dimensions are under normal conditions. Relevant information should include growth rates, factors that affect growth (e.g., diet, tank size, water quality), average size ranges for common goldfish varieties, and any lifespan‑related growth considerations.

title: WiFi vs Bluetooth
description: What are the key differences between Wi‑Fi and Bluetooth?
narrative: The user wants a comparative overview of Wi‑Fi and Bluetooth technologies, including aspects such as purpose, range, data rate, power consumption, typical use cases, advantages, and disadvantages. Relevant documents should explicitly contrast the two protocols, provide technical specifications, and discuss scenarios where one is preferred over the other.

title: US Entry WWI
description: Why did the United States voluntarily enter World War I?
narrative: The user is seeking a clear explanation of the motivations behind the United States' decision to join World War I, focusing on political, economic, and social factors such as the sinking of the Lusitania, the Zimmermann Telegram, economic ties to the Allies, and public opinion. Relevant documents should describe these causes, provide timelines, and reference key figures and events that influenced the U.S. declaration of war in April 1917.

title: Declaratory Judgment Definition
description: What is the legal definition of a declaratory judgment?
narrative: The user is seeking an authoritative explanation of the term “declaratory judgment,” including its essential elements, purpose, and how it is defined in statutes, case law, or reputable legal reference works. Relevant documents should provide a clear, concise definition, cite the governing legal provisions or leading cases, and may discuss jurisdictional nuances or typical contexts in which declaratory judgments are sought.

title: Right Pelvic Pain
description: What are the possible causes of right-sided pelvic pain in adults?
narrative: The user is seeking comprehensive medical information about the etiologies of right pelvic pain, including gynecological, urological, gastrointestinal, musculoskeletal, and vascular origins. Relevant documents should describe common and serious conditions that present with right pelvic discomfort, discuss associated symptoms, risk factors, and diagnostic considerations, and be sourced from reputable health or clinical resources.

title: Social Determinants
description: What are the social determinants of health and how do they influence health outcomes?
narrative: The user wants a comprehensive overview of the social determinants of health, including clear definitions, a list of major factors such as income, education, housing, environment, and social support, and evidence of how these factors affect health outcomes; relevant results should directly discuss these determinants, provide reputable sources or frameworks, and explain their impact on population health.

title: Legionella Pneumonia
description: Determine if Legionella pneumophila is a causative agent of pneumonia.
narrative: The user seeks authoritative information confirming whether Legionella pneumophila can cause pneumonia, including clinical evidence, epidemiology, pathogenesis, and relevant medical guidelines. Relevant documents should explicitly discuss Legionella pneumophila as a pathogen responsible for pneumonia, describe the disease manifestation (Legionnaires' disease), and provide supporting data such as case studies, research findings, or official health recommendations.

title: Jamaica Weather
description: What is the current weather condition in Jamaica?
narrative: The user seeks up‑to‑date information about the weather in Jamaica, including temperature, precipitation, humidity, and overall conditions. Relevant results should provide recent forecasts, real‑time observations, or reliable weather reports for Jamaica at the time of the query.

title: Cerebral Palsy Dysarthria
description: What are the different types of dysarthria that can occur in individuals with cerebral palsy?
narrative: The user wants a comprehensive overview of dysarthria subtypes linked to cerebral palsy, including a list of the classifications (e.g., spastic, ataxic, flaccid, mixed) and brief descriptions of their characteristic speech features and clinical relevance. Relevant information should focus on how each dysarthria type manifests in CP patients, diagnostic criteria, and any distinguishing factors.

title: Robert Gray
description: Who is Robert Gray and what are his notable accomplishments or biography?
narrative: The user wants a concise, authoritative overview of the individual named Robert Gray, including basic biographical details (e.g., birth/death dates, occupation) and his most notable achievements or contributions. Relevant documents are reputable biographical sources such as encyclopedia entries, official biographies, or well‑cited profiles that clearly identify which Robert Gray is being described and provide the key facts about his life and work.

title: Sous Vide Foods
description: What foods can be prepared using the sous vide cooking method?
narrative: The user wants a comprehensive overview of the types of food suitable for sous‑vide cooking, including categories such as meats, poultry, fish, seafood, vegetables, eggs, and desserts, with examples and brief notes on preparation or cooking considerations. Relevant resources should list these food items, describe their suitability for sous vide, and may provide typical cooking times or tips.

title: Flea Life Cycle
description: What is the duration of the flea life cycle from egg to adult?
narrative: The user is looking for factual information describing the complete flea life cycle, including the length of each developmental stage (egg, larva, pupa, adult) and the total time required under typical conditions. Relevant documents should provide specific time ranges, factors that affect the cycle (e.g., temperature, humidity), and credible sources such as entomology references or veterinary guides.

title: Contour Plowing Benefits

narrative: The user seeks the exact date or year that the Salvation Army was established, including any relevant historical context about its origin. title: Active Margin Definition
description: What does the term "active margin" mean in finance or trading?
narrative: The user wants a clear, authoritative definition of "active margin," including how it is calculated, its purpose in margin accounts, and how it differs from other margin concepts. title: RN vs BSN
description: What are the key differences between a Registered Nurse (RN) and a Bachelor of Science in Nursing (BSN) degree?
narrative: The user wants a detailed comparison of the RN and BSN credentials, covering education and training requirements, licensing processes, scope of practice, typical job responsibilities, career advancement opportunities, salary ranges, and common work settings. Relevant documents should clearly delineate each of these aspects and explain the relative advantages and disadvantages of pursuing an RN versus a BSN.

title: Medicare Ventilation Definition
description: What is the official Medicare definition of mechanical ventilation?
narrative: The user wants the precise definition of mechanical ventilation as used by Medicare for coverage and reimbursement decisions. Relevant information includes the language found in CMS (Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services) manuals, Medicare Coverage Determination (LCD) documents, National Coverage Determinations (NCDs), and other official Medicare policy or regulatory texts that define "mechanical ventilation" for billing and eligibility purposes. Sources that provide general medical descriptions of ventilation are not sufficient unless they explicitly cite the Medicare definition.

title: Trapezoid Midsegment
description: How to calculate the length of the midsegment (median) of a trapezoid.
narrative: The user is looking for a clear method to determine the midsegment of a trapezoid, including the definition of the midsegment, the formula relating it to the lengths of the two bases, step‑by‑step calculations, and example problems. Relevant documents should explain the geometric properties, provide the formula (midsegment = (base1 + base2) / 2), show derivations or proofs, and may include diagrams or instructional videos.

title: AML Surveillance Analyst
description: What is an AML surveillance analyst and what are their responsibilities?
narrative: The user wants a concise definition of the role of an Anti-Money Laundering (AML) surveillance analyst, including typical duties, required skills and qualifications, tools used, and how the position fits within compliance or financial‑crime teams. Relevant information should describe job functions, educational/background requirements, career progression, and examples of daily tasks.

title: Thai Daily Life
description: What are the typical daily routines, activities, and cultural practices of people living in Thailand?
narrative: The user wants a comprehensive overview of everyday life for Thai people, covering work, education, family responsibilities, meals, transportation, leisure, and regional or social variations. Relevant sources should describe typical schedules, common customs, social norms, and lifestyle aspects that characterize daily living in Thailand.

title: SIGMET Definition
description: What is the definition of a SIGMET (Significant Meteorological Information) in aviation?
narrative: The user seeks an authoritative definition of a SIGMET, including its purpose, the weather phenomena it covers, and the issuing authority. title: Interior Concrete Flooring Cost
description: What is the typical cost to install interior concrete flooring, including material and labor expenses?
narrative: The user is seeking up-to-date information on the price range for interior concrete flooring. Sources that only discuss exterior concrete or unrelated flooring types are not relevant.

title: Swiss Popular Food
description: Identify the most popular food or dish in Switzerland.
narrative: The user wants to know which food item or dish is considered the most popular in Switzerland. Relevant results should name the leading food, provide supporting evidence such as consumption statistics, surveys, expert or cultural commentary, and may discuss regional variations or historical significance. title: Warm‑blooded Sharks
description: Which shark species are warm‑blooded and how do they physiologically maintain higher body temperatures?
narrative: The user wants reliable scientific information about endothermy in sharks, including a list of shark species that exhibit warm‑blooded traits (e.g., lamnids such as the great white, short‑fin mako, salmon shark, porbeagle) and an explanation of the physiological mechanisms (regional endothermy, rete mirabile, counter‑current heat exchangers, muscular heat production) that allow these sharks to keep their body temperature above ambient water. Relevant documents should describe the biology of shark thermoregulation, cite credible marine‑biology sources, and provide clear details on species and mechanisms.

title: Durable Medical Equipment Definition
description: What items are included in durable medical equipment and how is it defined?
narrative: The user is seeking a comprehensive definition of durable medical equipment (DME), including the categories of items that qualify as DME (e.g., wheelchairs, hospital beds, oxygen supplies, prosthetics, etc.). title: Exon Definition

Relevant documents should provide a concise biological definition, explain where exons are located in DNA/RNA, describe their contribution to mature mRNA and protein coding, and may reference standard textbooks, review articles, or reputable online biology resources.

title: Tracheids Classification
description: What plant tissue or vascular system includes tracheids?

Relevant sources should describe tracheids as elongated water‑conducting cells that belong to the xylem of vascular plants, explaining their role within the plant's vascular system.

title: RSA Definition and Key
description: What is the RSA cryptographic algorithm and how are its keys defined and used?
